title: Curiously looking for a quote
wikitext:
[]: Curiously/looking for a quote             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Wed Sep 22, 2010 3:36 pm I'm looking for a quote I once read that was either said by Megumi Hayashibara or Megumi Ogata. In the quote, one of the two defended Shinji and his actions, that me happy to read. It's nice to see voice actors defend the characters they play.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 22, 2010 4:07 pm Is it either of these? http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_ogata01.php http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_hayashibara01.php

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Wed Sep 22, 2010 5:01 pm It's the Hayashibara one. Thanks 'Monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 22, 2010 5:07 pm
